The task is to decompose a system prompt into four independent modules. Each module must be self-contained and focused on a specific aspect of the task. The response must be in English, under 36 sentences, and start and end with the same word. No markdown is allowed, and words with all capital letters should appear no more than three times.

The first module involves identifying the core objective of the task, which is to decompose a system prompt into four independent modules. The second module focuses on breaking down the original instruction into its key components, such as the role, constraints, and output requirements. The third module ensures that each module is self-contained and addresses a distinct part of the task. The fourth module ensures that all aspects of the original prompt are addressed and that the final response meets all constraints.
